  -f, --framework            Required. Specify the framework: net10.0-android,

  -p, --proj                 Project file name (if different from that contained

  -d, --dir                  Working directory (if different from the current
                             one)

  -m, --mode                 Slim(default) or Full

  -h, --host                 Identify the remote host running the emulator

  -r, --register-defaults    Register default MsBuild locations using
                             MSBuildLocator.RegisterDefaults()

  --help                     Display this help screen.

  --version                  Display version information.
